case_title: MARIA EDER VS. PETER PADUANO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDER, MARIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAR-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOGGIN, JOHN
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PETER PADUANO, AND KIMBERLY PAUL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-12-2015 AT 3:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO KIMBERLY PAUL RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT JOHN GOGGIN. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDER, MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDER, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOGGIN, JOHN $5,450.21 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,540.21, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST PETER PADUANO AND KIMBERLY PAUL ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDER, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOGGIN, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE BY CERTIFIED MAIL. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOGGIN, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE IS A CERTIFIED INTERPRETER AND DID NOT REQUIRE AN INTERPRETER FOR TODAYS HEARING. ALTHOUGH SHANNON RAINTREE--SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS PRESENT AT THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,450.21 FILED BY EDER, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT PADUANO, PETER PAUL, KIMBERLY GOGGIN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (20 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF EDER, MARIA
